title: Durability101 Fabric/Forge 1.12-1.21.11
description: A rewrite of the original Durability101 mod
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Le7cALn.png)

Forge 1.13+ uses the Forge team's [CoreMods](https://github.com/MinecraftForge/CoreMods) project instead of the Sponge team's [Mixin](https://github.com/SpongePowered/Mixin) project.

Forge 1.12 uses the Sponge team's [Mixin](https://github.com/SpongePowered/Mixin) project, which does not require [MixinBootstrap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixinbootstrap).

If you experience any crashes with 1.12, you may need [MixinCompat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-0-7-0-8-compatibility) or to rename [MixinBootstrap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixinbootstrap) as detailed [here](https://github.com/LXGaming/MixinBootstrap/issues/38).

#### Other Mods:
- [Durability Viewer (LiteLoader 1.7.10-1.8.9)](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/durability-viewer)
- [Durability101 (Vanilla, ML, and Forge 1.3.2-1.6.2)](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1285383-1-6-2-jul-13-durability101-hotbar-visible-use)

[Feel free to use in any mod pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/durability101)
